name: search_listings
description: Search the HanapBahay listing database for properties matching the given criteria. Returns a ranked list of live listings with key fields. Call this whenever the user asks to find, browse, or discover properties.

property_type.description: One or more property types to include. Omit to search all types.

min_price.description: Minimum price in PHP. Omit if no lower bound.

max_price.description: Maximum price in PHP. Set to the buyer's maximum affordable price unless they explicitly ask to see beyond it.

city.description: City or municipality name to search within.

lat.description: Latitude of a reference point (e.g., workplace) for proximity search.

radius_km.description: Search radius in kilometres around the lat/lng point.

q.description: Free-text search query (e.g., 'near BGC with pool').

per_page.description: Number of results to return. Default 10, max 50.
